shorts.title_distilled: ​‘The Office US’ cast: Where the Dunder Mifflin folks are now​.
shorts.description: Over ten years since the last episode, ‘The Office US’ is still one of the all-time favorites. This mockumentary about the oddball staff at Dunder Mifflin in Scranton, Pennsylvania, first hit screens in 2005 and stuck around for nine seasons, wrapping up in 2…

shorts.title: Two bridge replacement projects on display
shorts.title_distilled: Two bridge replacement projects on display.
shorts.description: SCOTT TOWNSHIP, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — The Pennsylvania Department of Transportation (PennDOT) laid out its plans Tuesday for two bridge replacement projects in Lackawanna County. Construction is not set to begin for at least two more years, but the department is preparing the community for the work ahead. The Scott Township projects are not set [...]
shorts.content: SCOTT TOWNSHIP, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — The Pennsylvania Department of Transportation (PennDOT) laid out its plans Tuesday for two bridge replacement projects in Lackawanna County. Construction is not set to begin for at least two more years, but the department is preparing the community for the work ahead. The Scott Township projects are not set [...]

shorts.title: Report It: Send your St. Patrick's photos
shorts.description: (WBRE/WYOU) — Residents in Northeastern Pennsylvania and beyond are celebrating Saint Patrick's Day, and 28/22 News wants to see it. Head to 28/22's Report It! page and submit your videos and photos of your celebrations from this week. Anyone with photos and videos from Saturday and Sunday's celebrations in Scranton and Wilkes-Barre are also encouraged [...]

shorts.title: Report: Scranton snow removal system tested, fell short
shorts.title_distilled: Report: Scranton snow removal system tested, fell short.
shorts.description: SCRANTON, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — January 25th, 2026, brought nearly a foot of snow to most of the Northeast region of Pennsylvania. With a combination of quickly accumulating snow and below-freezing temperatures, counties across northeastern and central Pennsylvania saw significant snow totals that crippled the region for days. In Lackawanna County, Scranton saw nearly 10 [...]

shorts.title: 867-5309: Jenny's number now has NEPA area code
shorts.title_distilled: 867-5309: Jenny's number now has NEPA area code.
shorts.description: (WBRE/WYOU) — A new helpline from a global nonprofit is using the phone number 867-5309 from the popular 1981 pop song Jenny, by Tommy Tutone, and the area code added is from northeastern and central Pennsylvania. The number, listed as (CSC) 867-5309. Which correlates to NEPA's newest area code (272). Singer Tommy Heath teamed up [...]

shorts.title: Foot chase leads to drug and gun arrest
shorts.title_distilled: Foot chase leads to drug and gun arrest.
shorts.description: CARBONDALE, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — Police say they have arrested two men after a burglary occurred, which led officers to find drugs inside a hotel room. The City of Carbondale Police Department said they arrested two men, Robert Villa, 30, of Moosic, and Evan Gaughan, 24, of Taylor, after responding to a burglary report. On [...]

shorts.title: DA seeks death penalty in Scranton apartments double homicide
shorts.title_distilled: DA seeks death penalty in Scranton apartments double homicide.
shorts.description: SCRANTON, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — The Lackawanna County District Attorney has filed to seek the death penalty against a man who is charged with killing two women at the Hotel Jermyn Apartments. District Attorney Brian Gallagher announced that prosecutors have formally filed notice to seek capital punishment against Michael Woods after he was charged with [...]
